# Fixed Income Bond Features

> Classify bond indenture terms — issuer, maturity, coupon, seniority, collateral, covenants — and describe how contractual features drive cash flow and credit risk

**Category:** Trading · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** fixed-income · bond-features · indenture · covenants · seniority · cfa-level-1

## What this does

Classify bond indenture terms — issuer, maturity, coupon, seniority, collateral, covenants — and describe how contractual features drive cash flow and credit risk

Specifies 3 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **bond_id** *(text, required)* — Bond identifier (CUSIP / ISIN)
- **issuer_type** *(select, required)* — sovereign | supranational | quasi_government | corporate | municipal | securitised
- **coupon_type** *(select, required)* — fixed | floating | zero | step_up | deferred | inflation_linked
- **seniority** *(select, optional)* — senior_secured | senior_unsecured | subordinated | junior_subordinated
- **collateral** *(select, optional)* — unsecured | mortgage | equipment | covered | sovereign_guarantee

## What must be true

- **indenture_contents → obligations:** Issuer obligations — payment schedule, covenants
- **indenture_contents → rights:** Bondholder rights — voting, acceleration
- **indenture_contents → definitions:** Events of default, remedies
- **coupon_structures → fixed:** Constant rate through life
- **coupon_structures → floating:** Reference rate + quoted margin
- **coupon_structures → zero:** Issued at discount; no periodic coupons
- **coupon_structures → step_up:** Rate increases on schedule
- **coupon_structures → deferred:** No coupons early; large later
- **coupon_structures → inflation_linked:** Principal or coupon indexed to CPI
- **covenants → affirmative:** Must do — audited statements, insurance
- **covenants → negative:** Must not do — additional debt above cap, asset sales
- **covenants → maintenance:** Maintain ratios (coverage, leverage)
- **covenants → incurrence:** Only when new action is taken
- **seniority_ladder → order_of_payment:** Senior secured, Senior unsecured, Subordinated, Junior subordinated, Preferred equity, Common equity
- **contingency_provisions → callable:** Issuer may redeem early
- **contingency_provisions → putable:** Bondholder may demand redemption
- **contingency_provisions → convertible:** Convert to equity at ratio
- **validation → bond_required:** bond_id present
- **validation → valid_issuer:** issuer_type in allowed set
- **validation → valid_coupon:** coupon_type in allowed set

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Classify Bond** — when bond_id exists; issuer_type in ["sovereign","supranational","quasi_government","corporate","municipal","securitised"]; coupon_type in ["fixed","floating","zero","step_up","deferred","inflation_linked"], then call service; emit bond.classified. _Why: Produce structured classification of bond indenture._

**❌ Failure paths**

- **Invalid Issuer** — when issuer_type not_in ["sovereign","supranational","quasi_government","corporate","municipal","securitised"], then emit bond.classification_rejected. _Why: Unsupported issuer type._ *(error: `BOND_INVALID_ISSUER`)*
- **Invalid Coupon** — when coupon_type not_in ["fixed","floating","zero","step_up","deferred","inflation_linked"], then emit bond.classification_rejected. _Why: Unsupported coupon type._ *(error: `BOND_INVALID_COUPON`)*

## Errors it can return

- `BOND_INVALID_ISSUER` — issuer_type must be one of the supported issuer categories
- `BOND_INVALID_COUPON` — coupon_type must be one of the supported coupon types

## Events

**`bond.classified`**
  Payload: `classification_id`, `bond_id`, `issuer_type`, `coupon_type`, `seniority`

**`bond.classification_rejected`**
  Payload: `classification_id`, `reason_code`

## Connects to

- **fixed-income-cash-flow-structures** *(recommended)*
- **fixed-income-credit-analysis** *(recommended)*
